periods.name: Tonight
periods.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 10pm and midnight, then showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 73. Southwest wind 6 to 24 mph, with gusts as high as 40 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%.

periods.name: Thursday
periods.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Sunny
periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 7am. Mostly sunny. High near 85, with temperatures falling to around 83 in the afternoon. West northwest wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

periods.name: Thursday Night
periods.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 7pm and 9pm. Mostly cloudy. Low around 63, with temperatures rising to around 65 overnight. North northwest wind 1 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.
